results.title: Hope for Mtandire youths
results.description: Today is International Day of Hope in recognition of the mental fortitude that keeps the world turning. Our News Analyst WYCLIFFE NJIRAGOMA hops into a clinic that is restoring young people’s hope amid heartbreaks that defy their age: On designated Fridays, teens arrive carrying babies and heavy secrets that crash their peace of mind. results.title: The Lagos floods
results.description: FOR many residents of Lagos, the past few weeks have been an ordeal. Homes have been inundated, businesses temporarily shut, vehicles stranded, children ferried to school by boats, and countless families forced to wade through floodwaters simply to go about their daily lives.
